_comment: VDN Compare Plugin Configuration. Place this file alongside plugin.py in analysts_plugins/vdn_compare/.
_comment_column_map: Map your CSV headers (left) to reserved internal names (right): VIN, CONSUMER_SW_VERSION, VDN_LIST, MODEL. Use column_map if both files share the same headers. Use source_map / target_map if the two files have different column names for the same field.
